name: Creamy Purple Onion and Basil Dip
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Fresh Basil (chopped), OR 1/4 cup Dried Basil (crushed)
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the cream cheese until smooth, gradually adding the basil.
2. Blend in the sour cream and add the remaining ingredients.
3. Mix well and cover.
4. Chill before serving. Makes about 2 1/2 cups of dip.
5. Suggested dippers: Unsalted Potato Chips, Water Crackers, Green Bell Peppers, Mushrooms, Brussels Sprouts, Fennel, Smoked Deli Meats
